sources.title: HR Employee Referral Policy
sources.content:
Employees may refer external candidates through the internal careers portal.
Eligible referrals receive a $1,500 bonus after the referred employee completes 90 days of employment.
The referral bonus is not available when the employee is the candidate's hiring manager.
Employees may request a $2,000 referral bonus after 90 days for hard-to-fill roles.
